name: Downtown Sunday Market

Months Open.value: May, June, July, August, September, October

Products.value: Farm-fresh food, handcrafted goods, and small-batch creations from local makers, bakers, growers, and doers

notes: The on-file website (downtowncs.com/experience-downtown/sunday-market-downtown.html) is dead (404). The market is now branded 'Colorado Springs Sunday Market' / 'Sunday Market in Acacia Park', held Sundays 9am-2pm, May 10-Oct 25, at Acacia Park (115 E Platte Ave, Colorado Springs, CO 80903 - matches the on-file address, so no change made). It is organized by Hunt + Gather (huntandgathercos.com), a downtown Colorado Springs shop, and is also listed as an event by the Downtown Partnership (downtowncs.com), which provided the email and Facebook link. The on-file Facebook URL (facebook.com/DowntownSundayMarket) could not be verified as active/current; used the Facebook link currently published by downtowncs.com instead, which points to a newer profile ID. Instagram href on huntandgathercos.com contains a typo (instgram.com instead of instagram.com); corrected the domain since the handle 'huntandgathercos' is unambiguous. No SNAP/EBT, ADA accessibility, or organic certification information was found on any official source.
